pixels = img.load\(\)

# Use a threshold - if R, G, B are all above 200, treat as background.
threshold = 210
for y in range\(h\):
    for x in range\(w\):
        r, g, b, a = pixels[x, y]
        if r > threshold and g > threshold and b > threshold:
            pixels[x, y] = \(r, g, b, 0\)

out_path = os.path.expanduser\("~/projects/T&TMetal/public/images/logo.png"\)
img.save\(out_path, "PNG"\)
print\(f"Saved to {out_path}, size: {img.size}"\)

Bash(/tmp/imgenv/bin/python3 << 'PYEOF'
from PIL import Image
import os

logo_path = os.path.expanduser\("~/projects/T&TMetal/t&tlogo.jpg"\)
img = Image.open\(logo_path\).convert\("RGBA"\)
pixels = img.load\(\)
w, h = img.size

# More aggressive threshold to catch the light gray grid background too
threshold = 180
for y in range\(h\):
    for x in range\(w\):
        r, g, b, a = pixels[x, y]
        if r > threshold and g > threshold and b > threshold:
            pixels[x, y] = \(r, g, b, 0\)

# Crop to bounding box of non-transparent pixels
bbox = img.getbbox\(\)
if bbox:
    img = img.crop\(bbox\)

out_path = os.path.expanduser\("~/projects/T&TMetal/public/images/logo.png"\)
img.save\(out_path, "PNG"\)
print\(f"Saved to {out_path}, size: {img.size}"\)
PYEOF)

Bash(/tmp/imgenv/bin/python3 << 'PYEOF'
from PIL import Image
import os
import glob

img_dir = os.path.expanduser\("~/projects/T&TMetal/public/images"\)
max_width = 1200
quality = 80
total_before = 0
total_after = 0

for path in glob.glob\(os.path.join\(img_dir, "*.jpg"\)\):
    before = os.path.getsize\(path\)
    total_before += before
    
    img = Image.open\(path\)
    w, h = img.size
    
    if w > max_width:
        ratio = max_width / w
        new_h = int\(h * ratio\)
        img = img.resize\(\(max_width, new_h\), Image.LANCZOS\)
    
    img.save\(path, "JPEG", quality=quality, optimize=True\)
    after = os.path.getsize\(path\)
    total_after += after
    
    saved = \(\(before - after\) / before\) * 100
    print\(f"{os.path.basename\(path\)}: {before//1024}KB -> {after//1024}KB \({saved:.0f}% saved\)"\)

# Also optimize the PNG logo
logo_path = os.path.join\(img_dir, "logo.png"\)
if os.path.exists\(logo_path\):
    before = os.path.getsize\(logo_path\)
    total_before += before
    img = Image.open\(logo_path\)
    w, h = img.size
    if w > 400:
        ratio = 400 / w
        new_h = int\(h * ratio\)
        img = img.resize\(\(400, new_h\), Image.LANCZOS\)
    img.save\(logo_path, "PNG", optimize=True\)
    after = os.path.getsize\(logo_path\)
    total_after += after
    print\(f"logo.png: {before//1024}KB -> {after//1024}KB"\)

print\(f"\\nTotal: {total_before//1024}KB -> {total_after//1024}KB \({\(\(total_before-total_after\)/total_before\)*100:.0f}% saved\)"\)
PYEOF)

from PIL import Image, ImageDraw
import os

# Create OG image: 1200x630 with dark background and logo centered
og_w, og_h = 1200, 630
bg_color = \(15, 17, 20\)
accent_color = \(200, 80, 45\)

img = Image.new\("RGB", \(og_w, og_h\), bg_color\)
draw = ImageDraw.Draw\(img\)

# Add a subtle accent bar at bottom
draw.rectangle\([0, og_h - 6, og_w, og_h], fill=accent_color\)

# Load and center the logo
logo_path = os.path.expanduser\("~/projects/T&TMetal/public/images/logo.png"\)
logo = Image.open\(logo_path\).convert\("RGBA"\)

# Scale logo to fit nicely
logo_max_h = 200
ratio = logo_max_h / logo.height
new_w = int\(logo.width * ratio\)
logo = logo.resize\(\(new_w, logo_max_h\), Image.LANCZOS\)

# Center it
x = \(og_w - new_w\) // 2
y = \(og_h - logo_max_h\) // 2 - 20

# Paste with transparency
img.paste\(logo, \(x, y\), logo\)

out_path = os.path.expanduser\("~/projects/T&TMetal/public/images/og-image.jpg"\)
img.save\(out_path, "JPEG", quality=90\)
print\(f"OG image saved: {os.path.getsize\(out_path\) // 1024}KB"\)
PYEOF)
